flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Fisk University fell 36% between 2021 and 2024 (38.0% → 24.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fisk University fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (45.7% → 29.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fisk University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.9k → $25.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fisk University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.9k → $25.9k).
